scope: PMS-R5 G3 LaneMap template audit (provenance + lossless reconstruction; speed CITED not re-measured)
proof_method: static UOp .key equivalence of template-emitted vs default-route kernel + packed-word-index formula match; no GPU, no re-measurement.

lanemap_template_schema._doc: minimal generic LaneMapTemplate: the degrees of freedom that fully describe a packed-quant GEMV lane-map route. The promoted G3 Q4_K route is one instantiation; nothing in its emission is hand-authored outside these fields.

parameterized_by_shape_quant_role.lane_extent: wave width; gfx1100 wave32 (WARP). Parameterized but currently fixed to the GPU wave.

hardcoded_for_q4k_qwen3_gfx1100.q4k_words_per_block: 36 uint32 words per Q4_K block (quant layout)
hardcoded_for_q4k_qwen3_gfx1100.words_per_group: 8 (Q4_K gate/up lane map requires 8 packed words per group)

template_pieces.lane_ownership: lane = block_group * words_per_group + word_col  (Q4KGateUpLaneMap.lane_expr); LanePartition(lane, lane_extent, words_per_group)
template_pieces.dequant_body: _q4k_block_dot_packed_load(words, x, base, blk, word_col) per reduce block
template_pieces.reduction: lane_partition_reduce_sum(acc, LanePartition)  (cross-lane sum over the partition)

generated_vs_hand_authored.generated: the entire wave32 UOp program (special/range axes, packed-word index UOps, reduce loop, cross-lane reduce, output store, KernelInfo name) is emitted by q4k_g3_lanemap_gemv_kernel from the LaneMap; no per-shape kernel is hand-written.
generated_vs_hand_authored.hand_authored_topology: the Q4_K packed-word LAYOUT constants (36 words, base 4, 8 words/group, 4 groups) and the _q4k_block_dot_packed_load dequant micro-op are the quant-format primitives the template binds to; the lane partition + reduce are reusable library pieces.

lanemap_serialized.packed_word_index_formula: (row * k_blocks + (block_group * blocks_per_group + local_block)) * q4k_words_per_block + q4k_quant_word_base + group_pair * words_per_group + word_col
(row * k_blocks + (block_group * blocks_per_group + local_block)) * q4k_words_per_block + q4k_quant_word_base + group_pair * words_per_group + word_col
(row * k_blocks + (block_group * blocks_per_group + local_block)) * q4k_words_per_block + q4k_quant_word_base + group_pair * words_per_group + word_col

speed_equivalence.note: speed-equivalent to owned warp (-0.13..+0.41% ctx512-4096), token-identical; NOT re-measured here (R5 is provenance, not speed).

do_not: do not rewrite the promoted G3 route (route identity/correctness must stay exact)
